businessDescription: Taste provides human expert judgment for AI agents through live real-time conversations. Experts evaluate trust, review AI outputs, rank options, fact-check claims, assess content safety, and arbitrate disputes — returning structured JSON deliverables. Available 09:00-23:00 CET daily. The only human-in-the-loop service on ACP.

resources.name: Expert Availability
resources.description: Live expert availability status including online expert count, active sessions, operating hours (09:00-23:00 CET with currentlyOpen boolean and nextOpenAt timestamp), supported domains with reputation scores, and all enabled offerings with pricing and SLA. Check this before creating a job to confirm experts are available and estimate response time.
